properties.remark: SEVERAL CARS STRANDED ON US HWY 83 N OF SAN YGNACIO FROM FLOODING.
GOLF BALL SIZE HAIL REPORTED IN PORT MANSFIELD.
ESTIMATED HALF DOLLAR SIZE HAIL. HAIL LASTED FOR 8 TO 10 MINUTES.
GOLF BALL SIZE HAIL IN NORTH HARLINGEN AT THE INTERSECTION OF 7TH STREET AND VINSON.

RIO HONDO POLICE DEPARTMENT REPORTS WINDSHIELDS OF 4 VEHICLES IN POSSESSION OF CITY OF RIO HONDO BROKEN DUE TO HAIL. VEHICLES PARKED AND STATIONARY WHEN DAMAGE OCCURRED. HAIL SIZE DETERMINED FROM SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS.
QUARTER SIZE HAIL REPORTED BY FAA AT HARLINGEN AIRPORT.
TENNIS BALL SIZE HAIL REPORT ON SOCIAL MEDIA.
DAMAGED WINDSHIELDS....DENTED VEHICLES...AND CHICKENS KILLED.
MEASURED REPORT RECEIVED ON SOCIAL MEDIA.
MEASURED REPORT RECEIVED ON SOCIAL MEDIA. HAIL BROKE WINDSHIELD AT RESIDENCE. OTHER WINDSHIELDS BROKEN BY HAIL IN NEIGHBORHOOD.
NWS EMPLOYEE REPORTS HALF DOLLAR SIZE HAIL ON NORTH SIDE OF HARLINGEN.

JIM HOGG COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTS FLOODING AT INTERSECTIONS OF LINAR AND MESQUITE... EAST AND WEST VIGGIE... AND NORTH AND SOUTH SMITH IN HEBBRONVILLE. FORD EXPLORER NEARLY STALLED DRIVING THROUGH FLOOD WATERS.
STORM SPOTTER REPOTED QUARTER SIZE HAIL IN FALFURRIAS.
NWS SKYWARN SPOTTER REPORTED QUARTER SIZE HAIL IN ENCINO.
BUOY 42020 REPORTED GUST OF 37 KNOTS.
TABS BUOY K REPORTED GUST OF 36 KNOTS.
EMPLOYEE AT PEPES GROCERY STORE IN SAN YGNACIO STATES CUSTOMER REPORTED HAIL THE SIZE OF GOLF BALLS 5 MILES NNE OF SAN YGNACIO.
PUBLIC REPORT VIA FACEBOOK STATED QUARTER SIZE HAIL IN THE CITY OF ZAPATA.

ZAPATA COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTS MEDINA ADDITION ARROYO AND CORRALITOS AREA ARROYO FLOODED WITH WATER AND DEBRIS OVER HIGHWAY 83 IN VICINITY OF SAN YGNACIO. ALSO FLOODING IN CITY OF ZAPATA WITH WATER DEPTH UNKNOWN AT THIS TIME.
KRGV 5 NEWS REPORTED STRUCTURAL DAMAGE TO HOUSE IN FRONTON. THUNDERSTORM WINDS BLEW ROOF OFF OF HOUSE. TIME ESTIMATED VIA RADAR IMAGERY.
PUBLIC REPORTED 3 TO 4 TREES BLOWN DOWN BY THUNDERSTORM WINDS IN FRONTON. ALSO STATED ROOF DAMAGE TO HOUSE IN FRONTON OCCURRED ON GUERRA STREET.
PUBLIC REPORTED HALF DOLLAR SIZE HAIL IN FRONTON.
STARR COUNTY SHERIFFS DEPARTMENT REPORTS UTILITY POLE BLOWN DOWN BY THUNDERSTORM WINDS ON LUCIANO ROAD IN ESCOBARES.
ZAPATA COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTS OUTSIDE LANES FLOODED ON HIGHWAY 16. ALSO FLOODING AT INTERSECTION OF FIRST AND CARLA IN THE CITY OF ZAPATA. WATER DEPTH UNKNOWN AT THIS TIME.
ROMA POLICE DEPARTMENT REPORTS SIX INCHES OF FLOWING WATER AT THE INTERSECTION OF HARRISON AND RAUCON NEAR THE ARROYO ROMA IN THE CITY OF ROMA.
JIM HOGG COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTS FLOODING ON WEST GALBRAITH AND AT THE INTERSECTION OF VIGGIE AND HINOJOSA. DEPTH OF WATER UNKNOWN AT THIS TIME.
RIO GRANDE CITY POLICE DEPARTMENT REPORTS FLOODING ON EMBASSY STREET....LA LOMA...AND AT THE INTERSECTION OF MAIN AND WASHINGTON. DEPTH OF WATER UNKNOWN AT THIS TIME.
FALFURRIAS FIRE DEPARTMENT REPORTS FLOODING ON NOBLE STREET AND AT THE INTERSECTION OF ST MARYS AND BENNETT. WATER DEPTH ON NOBLE STREET 18 INCHES.
TREE DOWN ON KENNEDY AVENUE NEAR 10TH STREET. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR IMAGERY AND MCALLEN ASOS.
BROOKS COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTED GOLF BALL SIZE HAIL 5 MILES EAST OF US 281 ALONG SR 285.
BROOKS COUNTY SO REPORTED GOLF BALL SIZE HAIL 5 MILES EAST OF HIGHWAY 281 ON E 285.
BROOKS COUNTY SO REPORTED GOLF BALL SIZE HAIL 5 MILES OF HIGHWAY 77 ON E 285.
A COUPLE OF UTILITY POLES WERE REPORTED DOWN ALONG FM 491 APPROXIMATELY ONE MILE WEST OF BUS 77.
LARGE TREE DOWN VIA SOCIAL MEDIA POST. TIME ESTIMATED AT AROUND 5 PM.
TREES DOWN. TREE LIMBS DOWN ALONG GENERAL BRANT ROAD NEAR OLMITO NORTH ROAD.
51 KNOTS GUSTS REPORTED BY ASOS
PORTIONS OF A ROOF...FENCE ...AND AN ABOVE GROUND POOL SUSTAINED DAMAGE. ESTIMATED TIME OF DAMAGE AT 5 48 PM FROM RADAR.
LANDSPOUT REPORTED ON HIGHWAY 48 NEAR KEPPEL AMFELLS AT APPROXIMATELY 1230 PM... LASTING 1 MINUTE.
RIO GRANDE CITY POLICE DEPARTMENT REPORTS HAIL THE SIZE OF PING PONG BALLS ON THE WEST SIDE OF RIO GRANDE CITY.
PUBLIC VIA FACEBOOK REPORTS HAIL UP TO THE SIZE OF TENNIS BALL IN LOS VILLAREALES ON THE WEST SIDE OF RIO GRANDE CITY.
STARR COUNTY SHERIFFS DEPARTMENT REPORTS HAIL THE SIZE OF GOLF BALLS AT THE INTERSECTION OF FM 3167 AND HIGHWAY 83 ON THE WEST SIDE OF RIO GRANDE CITY.
PUBLIC VIA FACEBOOK REPORTS HAIL THE SIZE OF GOLF BALLS BETWEEN MIDWAY ROAD AND HOSPITAL DRIVE ON THE WEST SIDE OF RIO GRANDE CITY.
